seo.title: Alice Aussel Delamaide — International solidarity coordinator
seo.description: Personal site of Alice Aussel Delamaide, international solidarity coordinator. NGO career on exile and advocacy, humanitarian programme coordination in Africa, North Africa and Ukraine.

hero.label: Experience
hero.title: Professional
hero.lede: From France to Madagascar, through Central Africa, Ukraine and North Africa — coordination, logistics and advocacy.

seo.title: Work experience — Alice Aussel Delamaide
seo.description: Positions of responsibility in NGOs: humanitarian programme coordination in Central Africa, North Africa, Madagascar and Ukraine, on exile, health and logistics.

hero.label: Education
hero.title: Studies &
hero.lede: From public law to migration policies, from web development to gender studies — a multidisciplinary path.

hero.label: Volunteering
hero.title: Engagement &

seo.title: Volunteering and engagement — Alice Aussel Delamaide
seo.description: Associative engagement on exile, reception, advocacy and migration policy issues, in France and internationally.

hero.label: Digital projects
hero.title: Digital
hero.lede: Over ten years of server administration — I design and self-host web applications for small non-profits. Code is political: I try to align my digital practice with my values.
